issuer_name_as_stated: Krishna Institute of Medical Sciences Limited
extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by and against each entity: I counted only the Against rows—criminal proceedings of 4 against the Company, 2 against Directors and 1 against Promoters (7 total), statutory/regulatory proceedings of nil (0), and tax proceedings of 10 against the Company plus 1 against Subsidiaries (11 total); all By rows were excluded. The aggregate amount against the Company and Subsidiaries is the table's explicit Total of ₹361.90 million, comprising ₹361.81 million against the Company and ₹0.09 million against Subsidiaries, converted at ₹10 million per crore to ₹36.19 crore. The contingent-liabilities table is stated as of March 31, 2021 in ₹ million, but contains no stated Total row; therefore no total is extracted rather than summing line items. Revenue concentration disclosures are for Hyderabad hospitals as a percentage of group revenue (64.09% in Fiscal Year 2021), not company-wide top-five or top-ten customers, so both customer concentration fields are null; the source unit is million and the litigation amount conversion is 361.90 ÷ 10 = 36.19 crore.
